description.en: Attacks an enemy. On the caster's turn, gains <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>Unique Resource: Natural Talent</color>.If the target is <color=#28d9ed>Water</color>, gains <color=#28d9ed>20</color> <color=#28d9ed>AP</color>.
description.jp: 敵を攻撃し、自分のターンなら<color=#28d9ed>固有資源:天賦の才能</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>獲得。対象が<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>の場合、自分の<color=#28d9ed>AP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20</color>獲得。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 턴이라면 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 타고난 재능</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 획득합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>수속성</color> 일 경우 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>AP</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20</color> 획득합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。在自己的回合,获得<color=#28d9ed>2</color><color=#28d9ed>「固有资源:天赋」</color>。若目标为<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>,额外获得<color=#28d9ed>20</color><color=#28d9ed>AP</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. On the caster's turn, gains <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>Unique Resource: Natural Talent</color>. This skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of <color=#28d9ed>Water</color> or <color=#28d9ed>Healer</color> enemies. <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monsters</color>: Deals increased damage.
description.jp: 敵を攻撃し、自分のターンなら<color=#28d9ed>固有資源:天賦の才能</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>獲得。 このスキルは<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>または<color=#28d9ed>回復型</color>の敵の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視。 <color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>へのダメージ増加。
description.kr:
적을 공격하고 자신의 턴이라면 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 타고난 재능</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 획득합니다. 

이 스킬은 <color=#28d9ed>수속성</color> 또는 <color=#28d9ed>회복형</color> 적의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.

<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 피해량이 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。在自己的回合,获得<color=#28d9ed>2</color><color=#28d9ed>「固有资源:天赋」</color>。 此技能无视<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>或<color=#28d9ed>回复型</color>敌人<color=#28d9ed>30%</color><color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>。 对<color=#ffd732>异型怪</color>造成额外伤害。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. On the caster's turn, gains <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>Unique Resource: Natural Talent</color>. Enemies killed by this skill that are <color=#28d9ed>Water</color> or <color=#28d9ed>Healer</color> cannot be revived, and bosses take increased damage. If holding <color=#28d9ed>5</color> <color=#28d9ed>Natural Talent</color>, consumes all to reset the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Faster Than a Bullet!</color> and ignore <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>. <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monsters</color>: Deals increased damage.
description.jp: 敵を攻撃し、自分のターンなら<color=#28d9ed>固有資源:天賦の才能</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>獲得。このスキルで倒された<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>または<color=#28d9ed>回復型</color>の敵は復活・蘇生不可、ボスには追加ダメージ。<color=#28d9ed>天賦の才能</color>を<color=#28d9ed>5</color>所持している場合、全て消費して<color=#28d9ed>「弾丸より速く!」</color>のスキルターンを全回復し、<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視。<color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>へのダメージ増加。
description.kr:
적을 공격하고 자신의 턴이라면 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 타고난 재능</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 획득합니다.
이 스킬로 사망한 <color=#28d9ed>수속성</color> 또는 <color=#28d9ed>회복형</color> 적은 부활 및 소생이 불가능하며 보스에게는 더 큰 피해를 입힙니다.
<color=#28d9ed>고유 자원 : 타고난 재능</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>5개</color> 보유 시, 모두 소모하여 <color=#28d9ed>총알보다 빠르게!</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>모두</color> 회복시키고 대상의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.

<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 피해량이 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。在自己的回合,获得<color=#28d9ed>2</color><color=#28d9ed>「固有资源:天赋」</color>。 被此技能击杀的<color=#28d9ed>水属性</color>或<color=#28d9ed>回复型</color>敌人无法复活,对首领怪物造成的伤害提高。 若持有<color=#28d9ed>5</color><color=#28d9ed>天赋</color>,则全部消耗以重置<color=#28d9ed>「比子弹更快!」</color>的冷却,并无视<color=#28d9ed>30%</color><color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>。 对<color=#ffd732>异型怪</color>造成额外伤害。

description.en: When hit, grants all allies <color=#28d9ed>Defense Up</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.jp: 被撃時、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>防御力増加</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>付与する。
description.kr: 피격 시 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color> 증가를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 受到攻击时,我方全体获得<color=#28d9ed>防御力提升</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
